case_title: HANG LY et al VS. MICHELLE O'DONAGHUE et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-30-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-30-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-21-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-30-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LY, HANG LY, HOAI AS TO DEFENDANT O'DONAGHUE, MICHELLE DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-21-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-21-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-06-2003
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-25-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST ANDRES C. SERAFICA FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-25-2003 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-12-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LETICIA PEREZ. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR FEB-25-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
